summary: Iteration 72: Verified P0 bug fix for beta invite links (/invite/{code}) redirecting to homepage. All tests pass - frontend InviteRedirect component correctly redirects /invite/:code to /join?code={code}, registration form displays 'you're invited.' message, and full registration flow with valid invite code successfully creates account and redirects to /hive.

issues: Console warning: DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for screen reader accessibility. Consider wrapping with VisuallyHidden component.

passed_tests: Frontend: /join?code={code} shows 'you're invited.' registration form (not invalid code message)
Frontend: Registration form has all required elements (username, email, password, confirm password, submit)
Frontend: /nonexistent catch-all route redirects to homepage (/)
Frontend: Full registration flow with valid invite code (HG-TEST1234) creates account and redirects to /hive
Backend: POST /api/auth/register-invite returns 400 for invalid code
Backend: POST /api/auth/register-invite returns 422 for missing required fields
Backend: POST /api/auth/register-invite endpoint exists and routes correctly
Backend: Rate limiter works correctly (429 after too many requests)
Backend: Error responses have correct format with 'detail' field

checks: /invite/:code reads URL param and redirects to /join?code={code}
Case preserved in redirect (HG-TEST1234 stays HG-TEST1234)
Redirect happens via Navigate component with replace=true
searchParams.get('code') extracts invite code from URL
Form shown when code is present (codeInvalid=false)
Invalid code message shown only when no code provided
Code validation happens on submit (backend), not on page load
Returns 429 when rate limited (5 requests per 15 min)
Creates user and returns access_token on success

critical_code_review_comments: InviteRedirect component (App.js lines 85-89) correctly uses useParams() to extract :code and Navigate to redirect
Route order is correct: /invite/:code defined before catch-all /* route
JoinPage correctly uses searchParams.get('code') to read invite code from query string
Backend code normalization: data.code.strip().upper() ensures case-insensitive matching
Minor accessibility warning: DialogContent in onboarding flow missing DialogTitle for screen readers
seed_data_creation: Created HG-TEST1234 invite code for testing, verified registration flow consumed it correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 72 verified the P0 bug fix for invite links. The InviteRedirect component at /invite/:code correctly reads the URL param and redirects to /join?code={code}. JoinPage reads the code from searchParams and shows the registration form. Full e2e flow tested: /invite/HG-TEST1234 -> /join?code=HG-TEST1234 -> form fill -> submit -> /hive (success). Backend rate limiter triggers after 5 requests in 15 min window. Minor accessibility warning about DialogTitle in onboarding modal - low priority.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Beta invite links (/invite/{code}) redirecting to homepage instead of sign-up flow
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Missing /invite/:code route in App.js - catch-all route was redirecting /invite/* to /
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added InviteRedirect component that reads :code param and redirects to /join?code={code}
bug_fix_verification.fix_verified: YES - all redirect and registration flows working correctly
